title: polygala verticillata var. aparinoides
intro: Polygala verticillata var. aparinoides, also known as American jointweed or American polygala, is a flowering plant native to North America. Traditionally used in herbal medicine, this plant is valued for its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and immunomodulatory properties, which contribute to its medicinal properties. The health benefits of Polygala verticillata var. aparinoides include its potential to support respiratory health, boost the immune system, and exhibit antiviral and antibacterial activities. In herbal preparations, the plant is often dried and used as a tea, tincture, or infusion, with some also using it as a topical application for skin issues and wounds.
